```{r sensitivity-sa2b}
            "alt contrast for this year will be NA.")

  vcov_yr_a     <- if (!is.null(fit_a))     get_model_vcov(fit_a,     model_path, d_a)     else NULL
  vcov_yr_b     <- if (!is.null(fit_b))     get_model_vcov(fit_b,     model_path, d_b)     else NULL
  vcov_yr_b_alt <- if (!is.null(fit_b_alt)) get_model_vcov(fit_b_alt, model_path, d_b_alt) else NULL

  coefs <- bind_rows(
    if (!is.null(fit_a)) tidy_binary(fit_a, vcov_yr_a) %>%
      mutate(model_label = "model_a", year = yr, n_rows = nrow(d_a),
             site_id = SITE_ID, model_version = "sa2b_year_stratified"),
    if (!is.null(fit_b)) tidy_binary(fit_b, vcov_yr_b) %>%
      mutate(model_label = "model_b", year = yr, n_rows = nrow(d_b),
             site_id = SITE_ID, model_version = "sa2b_year_stratified"),
    if (!is.null(fit_b_alt)) tidy_binary(fit_b_alt, vcov_yr_b_alt) %>%
      mutate(model_label = "model_b_alt", year = yr, n_rows = nrow(d_b_alt),
             site_id = SITE_ID, model_version = "sa2b_year_stratified_alt")
  )

  contrast <- compute_contrast(
    tidy_binary(fit_a, vcov_yr_a),
    tidy_binary(fit_b, vcov_yr_b),
    vcov_yr_a, vcov_yr_b
  )
  if (!is.null(contrast))
    contrast <- contrast %>% mutate(year = yr, site_id = SITE_ID,
                                    model_version = "sa2b_year_stratified",
                                    framing = "primary_mutually_exclusive")

  contrast_alt <- compute_contrast(
    tidy_binary(fit_a, vcov_yr_a),
    tidy_binary(fit_b_alt, vcov_yr_b_alt),
    vcov_yr_a, vcov_yr_b_alt
  )
  if (!is.null(contrast_alt))
    contrast_alt <- contrast_alt %>% mutate(year = yr, site_id = SITE_ID,
                                            model_version = "sa2b_year_stratified_alt",
                                            framing = "alt_extended_def1")

  re_var <- bind_rows(
    extract_re_variance(fit_a,     "model_a_core_vs_nosepsis",             model_path, SITE_ID),
    extract_re_variance(fit_b,     "model_b_extended_vs_nosepsis",         model_path, SITE_ID),
    extract_re_variance(fit_b_alt, "model_b_alt_extended_def1_vs_nosepsis", model_path, SITE_ID)
  ) %>% mutate(year = yr)

  list(coefs = if (nrow(coefs) > 0) coefs else NULL,
       contrast = contrast, contrast_alt = contrast_alt, re_var = re_var)
})

coef_sa2b         <- bind_rows(map(sa2b_results, "coefs"))
contrast_sa2b     <- bind_rows(map(sa2b_results, "contrast"))
contrast_sa2b_alt <- bind_rows(map(sa2b_results, "contrast_alt"))
re_var_sa2b       <- bind_rows(map(sa2b_results, "re_var"))

cat(paste("SA2b complete:", length(years_available), "years attempted.\n"))
if (nrow(coef_sa2b) == 0)
  warning("SA2b: coef_sa2b is empty across all years — nothing will be written ",
          "for the SA2b coef file. See per-year warnings above for cause.")
if (nrow(contrast_sa2b) == 0)
  warning("SA2b: contrast_sa2b (primary framing) is empty across all years — ",
          "SA2b will not appear in contrast_estimates_all under the primary ",
          "framing. See per-year warnings above for which model failed each year.")
if (nrow(contrast_sa2b_alt) == 0)
  warning("SA2b: contrast_sa2b_alt (alt framing) is empty across all years — ",
          "SA2b will not appear in contrast_estimates_all under the alt ",
          "framing. See per-year warnings above for which model failed each year.")
if (nrow(coef_sa2b) > 0)
  kable(coef_sa2b %>% filter(term == "lactate_vol_scaled") %>%
          select(year, model_label, estimate, std.error, p.value, conf.low, conf.high),
        digits = 4, caption = "SA2b — lactate_vol_scaled by year and model")
if (nrow(contrast_sa2b) > 0)
  kable(contrast_sa2b, digits = 4, caption = "SA2b — primary contrast by year")
if (nrow(contrast_sa2b_alt) > 0)
  kable(contrast_sa2b_alt, digits = 4, caption = "SA2b — alt-framing contrast by year")
```

```{r sensitivity-sa3}
# SA3: Within-year centered lactate volume ─────────────────────────────────────
# Swaps lactate_vol_scaled for lactate_volume_centered; drops year_centered.
cat("Fitting SA3: within-year centered lactate volume\n")

sa3_rhs       <- c("lactate_volume_centered",
                    setdiff(covariate_terms, "year_centered"),
                    if (model_path == "glmer") "(1 | hospital_id_deident)" else NULL)
formula_sa3_a <- reformulate(sa3_rhs, response = "outcome_a")
formula_sa3_b <- reformulate(sa3_rhs, response = "outcome_b")

df_sa3_a <- df_model %>%
  filter(!is.na(lactate_volume_centered),
         patient_group %in% c("no_sepsis", "sepsis_core")) %>%
  mutate(outcome_a = as.integer(patient_group == "sepsis_core"))

df_sa3_b <- df_model %>%
  filter(!is.na(lactate_volume_centered),
         patient_group %in% c("no_sepsis", "sepsis_extended")) %>%
  mutate(outcome_b = as.integer(patient_group == "sepsis_extended"))

if (nrow(df_sa3_a) < nrow(filter(df_model,
                                   patient_group %in% c("no_sepsis","sepsis_core"))))
  warning("SA3: rows dropped due to missing lactate_volume_centered.")

warn_sa3_a <- NULL; warn_sa3_b <- NULL
model_sa3_a <- fit_binary(formula_sa3_a, df_sa3_a, model_path, "warn_sa3_a")
model_sa3_b <- fit_binary(formula_sa3_b, df_sa3_b, model_path, "warn_sa3_b")

vcov_sa3_a <- if (!is.null(model_sa3_a)) get_model_vcov(model_sa3_a, model_path, df_sa3_a) else NULL
vcov_sa3_b <- if (!is.null(model_sa3_b)) get_model_vcov(model_sa3_b, model_path, df_sa3_b) else NULL

coef_sa3 <- bind_rows(
  if (!is.null(model_sa3_a)) tidy_binary(model_sa3_a, vcov_sa3_a) %>%
    mutate(model_label = "model_a", model_version = "sa3_centered_lactate_model_a",
           centering_method = centering_method, site_id = SITE_ID),
  if (!is.null(model_sa3_b)) tidy_binary(model_sa3_b, vcov_sa3_b) %>%
    mutate(model_label = "model_b", model_version = "sa3_centered_lactate_model_b",
           centering_method = centering_method, site_id = SITE_ID)
)

# Contrast uses lactate_volume_centered as the term
contrast_sa3 <- compute_contrast(
  tidy_binary(model_sa3_a, vcov_sa3_a),
  tidy_binary(model_sa3_b, vcov_sa3_b),
  vcov_sa3_a, vcov_sa3_b,
  lactate_term = "lactate_volume_centered"
)
if (!is.null(contrast_sa3))
  contrast_sa3 <- contrast_sa3 %>%
    mutate(site_id = SITE_ID, model_version = "sa3_centered_lactate",
           centering_method = centering_method)

re_var_sa3 <- bind_rows(
  extract_re_variance(model_sa3_a, "model_a_core_vs_nosepsis",     model_path, SITE_ID),
  extract_re_variance(model_sa3_b, "model_b_extended_vs_nosepsis", model_path, SITE_ID)
)

cat("SA3 complete.\n")
if (nrow(coef_sa3) > 0)
  kable(coef_sa3 %>% filter(grepl("lactate", term)) %>%
          select(model_label, term, estimate, std.error, p.value, conf.low, conf.high),
        digits = 4, caption = "SA3 — lactate terms by model")
if (!is.null(contrast_sa3))
  kable(contrast_sa3, digits = 4, caption = "SA3 — primary contrast")

# SA3 alt framing — same centered-lactate covariate set and missingness
# restriction, full cohort, outcome = ASE_def_1==1 vs no_sepsis.
# Model A reused from SA3 above (no refit).
formula_sa3_b_alt <- reformulate(sa3_rhs, response = "outcome_b_alt")

df_sa3_b_alt <- df_model %>%
  filter(!is.na(lactate_volume_centered)) %>%
  mutate(outcome_b_alt = as.integer(patient_group_alt == "ase_extended_any"))

warn_sa3_b_alt  <- NULL
model_sa3_b_alt <- fit_binary(formula_sa3_b_alt, df_sa3_b_alt, model_path, "warn_sa3_b_alt")
vcov_sa3_b_alt  <- if (!is.null(model_sa3_b_alt))
  get_model_vcov(model_sa3_b_alt, model_path, df_sa3_b_alt) else NULL
coef_sa3_b_alt_raw <- tidy_binary(model_sa3_b_alt, vcov_sa3_b_alt)

if (!is.null(coef_sa3_b_alt_raw))
  coef_sa3 <- bind_rows(
    coef_sa3,
    coef_sa3_b_alt_raw %>%
      mutate(model_label = "model_b_alt", model_version = "sa3_centered_lactate_model_b_alt",
             centering_method = centering_method, site_id = SITE_ID)
  )

contrast_sa3_alt <- compute_contrast(
  tidy_binary(model_sa3_a, vcov_sa3_a),
  coef_sa3_b_alt_raw, vcov_sa3_a, vcov_sa3_b_alt,
  lactate_term = "lactate_volume_centered"
)
if (!is.null(contrast_sa3_alt))
  contrast_sa3_alt <- contrast_sa3_alt %>%
    mutate(site_id = SITE_ID, model_version = "sa3_centered_lactate_alt",
           centering_method = centering_method,
           n_hospitalizations = nrow(df_sa3_b_alt))

re_var_sa3 <- bind_rows(
  re_var_sa3,
  extract_re_variance(model_sa3_b_alt, "model_b_alt_extended_def1_vs_nosepsis", model_path, SITE_ID)
)

cat("SA3 alt framing complete.\n")
```

```{r sensitivity-sa4}
# SA4: SOFA-dropped sensitivity ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Rationale:  SA4 refits both models without
# worst_sofa_admission_to_24h and computes the contrast to assess whether the
# primary finding is sensitive to this potential over-adjustment due to structurally low SOFA for sepsis_extended patients .
cat("Fitting SA4: SOFA-dropped sensitivity\n")

covariate_terms_sa4 <- setdiff(covariate_terms, "worst_sofa_admission_to_24h")

if ("worst_sofa_admission_to_24h" %in% covariate_terms) {
  cat(paste("SA4: dropping worst_sofa_admission_to_24h. Remaining:",
            paste(covariate_terms_sa4, collapse = ", "), "\n"))
} else {
  cat("SA4: worst_sofa_admission_to_24h already excluded — SA4 identical to primary.\n")
}

# Same datasets as primary; only the formula changes
formula_sa4_a <- reformulate(
  c("lactate_vol_scaled", covariate_terms_sa4,
    if (model_path == "glmer") "(1 | hospital_id_deident)" else NULL),
  response = "outcome_a")
formula_sa4_b <- reformulate(
  c("lactate_vol_scaled", covariate_terms_sa4,
    if (model_path == "glmer") "(1 | hospital_id_deident)" else NULL),
  response = "outcome_b")

warn_sa4_a <- NULL; warn_sa4_b <- NULL
model_sa4_a <- fit_binary(formula_sa4_a, df_model_a, model_path, "warn_sa4_a")
model_sa4_b <- fit_binary(formula_sa4_b, df_model_b, model_path, "warn_sa4_b")

vcov_sa4_a <- if (!is.null(model_sa4_a)) get_model_vcov(model_sa4_a, model_path, df_model_a) else NULL
vcov_sa4_b <- if (!is.null(model_sa4_b)) get_model_vcov(model_sa4_b, model_path, df_model_b) else NULL

coef_sa4_a_raw <- tidy_binary(model_sa4_a, vcov_sa4_a)
coef_sa4_b_raw <- tidy_binary(model_sa4_b, vcov_sa4_b)

coef_sa4 <- bind_rows(
  if (!is.null(coef_sa4_a_raw)) coef_sa4_a_raw %>%
    mutate(model_label    = "model_a",
           model_version  = paste0(re_structure, "_sa4_sofa_dropped_model_a"),
           site_id        = SITE_ID,
           convergence_warn = !is.null(warn_sa4_a)),
  if (!is.null(coef_sa4_b_raw)) coef_sa4_b_raw %>%
    mutate(model_label    = "model_b",
           model_version  = paste0(re_structure, "_sa4_sofa_dropped_model_b"),
           site_id        = SITE_ID,
           convergence_warn = !is.null(warn_sa4_b))
)

contrast_sa4 <- compute_contrast(coef_sa4_a_raw, coef_sa4_b_raw, vcov_sa4_a, vcov_sa4_b)
if (!is.null(contrast_sa4))
  contrast_sa4 <- contrast_sa4 %>%
    mutate(
      site_id              = SITE_ID,
      model_version        = paste0(re_structure, "_sa4_sofa_dropped"),
      n_hospitals          = n_hospitals,
      n_hospitalizations   = nrow(df_model),
      blup_available       = (model_path == "glmer"),
      convergence_warn_a   = !is.null(warn_sa4_a),
      convergence_warn_b   = !is.null(warn_sa4_b),
      sensitivity_analysis = "SA4_sofa_dropped"
    )

re_var_sa4 <- bind_rows(
  extract_re_variance(model_sa4_a, "model_a_core_vs_nosepsis_sa4",     model_path, SITE_ID),
  extract_re_variance(model_sa4_b, "model_b_extended_vs_nosepsis_sa4", model_path, SITE_ID)
)

cat("SA4 complete.\n")
if (nrow(coef_sa4) > 0)
  kable(coef_sa4 %>% filter(grepl("lactate", term)) %>%
          select(model_label, term, estimate, std.error, p.value, conf.low, conf.high),
        digits = 4, caption = "SA4 — lactate terms by model (SOFA dropped)")
if (!is.null(contrast_sa4))
  kable(contrast_sa4, digits = 4, caption = "SA4 — primary contrast (SOFA dropped)")

# SA4 alt framing — same SOFA-dropped covariate set, same full cohort as
# Section 4b's df_model_b_alt (no row restriction beyond primary), outcome =
# ASE_def_1==1 vs no_sepsis. Model A reused from SA4 above (no refit).
formula_sa4_b_alt <- reformulate(
  c("lactate_vol_scaled", covariate_terms_sa4,
    if (model_path == "glmer") "(1 | hospital_id_deident)" else NULL),
  response = "outcome_b_alt")

warn_sa4_b_alt  <- NULL
model_sa4_b_alt <- fit_binary(formula_sa4_b_alt, df_model_b_alt, model_path, "warn_sa4_b_alt")
vcov_sa4_b_alt  <- if (!is.null(model_sa4_b_alt))
  get_model_vcov(model_sa4_b_alt, model_path, df_model_b_alt) else NULL
coef_sa4_b_alt_raw <- tidy_binary(model_sa4_b_alt, vcov_sa4_b_alt)

if (!is.null(coef_sa4_b_alt_raw))
  coef_sa4 <- bind_rows(
    coef_sa4,
    coef_sa4_b_alt_raw %>%
      mutate(model_label    = "model_b_alt",
             model_version  = paste0(re_structure, "_sa4_sofa_dropped_model_b_alt"),
             site_id        = SITE_ID,
             convergence_warn = !is.null(warn_sa4_b_alt))
  )

contrast_sa4_alt <- compute_contrast(coef_sa4_a_raw, coef_sa4_b_alt_raw, vcov_sa4_a, vcov_sa4_b_alt)
if (!is.null(contrast_sa4_alt))
  contrast_sa4_alt <- contrast_sa4_alt %>%
    mutate(
      site_id              = SITE_ID,
      model_version        = paste0(re_structure, "_sa4_sofa_dropped_alt"),
      n_hospitals          = n_hospitals,
      n_hospitalizations   = nrow(df_model_b_alt),
      blup_available       = (model_path == "glmer"),
      convergence_warn_a   = !is.null(warn_sa4_a),
      convergence_warn_b   = !is.null(warn_sa4_b_alt),
      sensitivity_analysis = "SA4_sofa_dropped_alt"
    )

re_var_sa4 <- bind_rows(
  re_var_sa4,
  extract_re_variance(model_sa4_b_alt, "model_b_alt_extended_def1_vs_nosepsis_sa4", model_path, SITE_ID)
)

cat("SA4 alt framing complete.\n")
```

---

# Section 6 — Output Assembly & Export

```{r export-compile}
# 6.1a Consolidated contrast export 

tag_contrast <- function(x, analysis, framing = NULL,
                        n_hospitalizations = NA_integer_, year = NA_integer_) {
  if (is.null(x)) return(NULL)
  if (!"analysis" %in% names(x))            x <- mutate(x, analysis = analysis)
  if (!is.null(framing) && !"framing" %in% names(x)) x <- mutate(x, framing = framing)
  if (!"year" %in% names(x))                x <- mutate(x, year = year)
  if (!"n_hospitalizations" %in% names(x))  x <- mutate(x, n_hospitalizations = n_hospitalizations)
  x
}

contrast_all <- bind_rows(
  tag_contrast(contrast_primary,  "primary",              "primary_mutually_exclusive", nrow(df_model)),
  tag_contrast(contrast_alt,      "primary",               n_hospitalizations = nrow(df_model_b_alt)),
  tag_contrast(contrast_sa1,      "sa1_lactate_ordered",  "primary_mutually_exclusive", nrow(df_sa1_b)),
  tag_contrast(contrast_sa1_alt,  "sa1_lactate_ordered",  "alt_extended_def1",          nrow(df_sa1_b_alt)),
  tag_contrast(contrast_sa2a,     "sa2a_exclude_covid",   "primary_mutually_exclusive", nrow(df_sa2a_b)),
  tag_contrast(contrast_sa2a_alt, "sa2a_exclude_covid",   "alt_extended_def1",          nrow(df_sa2a_b_alt)),
  tag_contrast(contrast_sa2b,     "sa2b_year_stratified"),
  tag_contrast(contrast_sa2b_alt, "sa2b_year_stratified"),
  tag_contrast(contrast_sa3,      "sa3_centered_lactate", "primary_mutually_exclusive", nrow(df_sa3_b)),
  tag_contrast(contrast_sa3_alt,  "sa3_centered_lactate", "alt_extended_def1",          nrow(df_sa3_b_alt)),
  tag_contrast(contrast_sa4,      "sa4_sofa_dropped",     "primary_mutually_exclusive", nrow(df_model)),
  tag_contrast(contrast_sa4_alt,  "sa4_sofa_dropped",     "alt_extended_def1",          nrow(df_model_b_alt))
) %>%
  select(site_id, analysis, framing, year, n_hospitalizations, everything())

if (nrow(contrast_all) == 0)
  warning("contrast_all is empty — every contrast in this run failed to compute. ",
          "Check model fit logs above before distributing.")

# 6.1b Consolidated RE variance export

tag_re_var <- function(x, analysis, year = NA_integer_) {
  if (is.null(x) || nrow(x) == 0) return(NULL)
  if (!"analysis" %in% names(x)) x <- mutate(x, analysis = analysis)
  if (!"year" %in% names(x))     x <- mutate(x, year = year)
  x %>% mutate(framing = if_else(grepl("alt", model_label),
                                 "alt_extended_def1", "primary_mutually_exclusive"))
}

re_var_all <- bind_rows(
  tag_re_var(re_var_primary, "primary"),
  tag_re_var(re_var_sa1,     "sa1_lactate_ordered"),
  tag_re_var(re_var_sa2a,    "sa2a_exclude_covid"),
  tag_re_var(re_var_sa2b,    "sa2b_year_stratified"),
  tag_re_var(re_var_sa3,     "sa3_centered_lactate"),
  tag_re_var(re_var_sa4,     "sa4_sofa_dropped")
) %>%
  select(site_id, analysis, framing, year, model_label, re_sigma2, re_sigma, re_available)

if (nrow(re_var_all) == 0)
  warning("re_var_all is empty — no RE variance rows produced across any analysis. ",
          "Expected for glm (single-hospital) path; unexpected for glmer path.")

# 6.1 Compile output list
output_list <- list(
  site_id              = SITE_ID,
  model_version_used   = re_structure,
  model_path           = model_path,
  interaction_type     = interaction_type,
  n_hospitals          = n_hospitals,
  n_hospitalizations   = nrow(df_model),
  n_dropped_check_dq   = n_check_dq,
  cor_lactate_year     = cor_lactate_year,
  dropped_covariates   = zero_var_covariates,
  lactate_mean         = lactate_center,
  lactate_sd           = lactate_scale,
  year_center          = year_center,
  centering_method     = centering_method,
  coef_primary         = coef_primary,
  vcov_model_a         = vcov_a,
  vcov_model_b         = vcov_b,
  contrast_all         = contrast_all,
  re_var_all           = re_var_all,
  blup_hospital        = blup_df,
  cohort_summary       = cohort_summary,
  ase_rate_by_year     = ase_rate_by_year,
  hosp_year_summary    = hosp_year_summary,
  hosp_year_detail     = hosp_year_detail,
  hosp_year_ase        = hosp_year_ase,
  group_summary        = group_summary,
  group_clinical       = group_clinical,
  coef_sa1             = coef_sa1,
  coef_sa2a            = coef_sa2a,
  coef_sa2b            = coef_sa2b,
  coef_sa3             = coef_sa3,
  coef_sa4             = coef_sa4,
  fig_lactate_trend    = fig_lactate_trend,
  fig_ase_gap          = fig_ase_gap,
  fig_group_dist       = fig_group_dist,
  fig_clinical_profile = fig_clinical_profile,
  fig_framing_comparison = fig_framing_comparison
)

# 6.2 Export CSVs
write_csv(baseline_completeness,
          file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "diagnostics",
               paste0(SITE_ID, "_01_baseline_completeness.csv")))
write_csv(qc_table,
          file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "diagnostics",
               paste0(SITE_ID, "_02_patient_group_qc.csv")))
write_csv(
  tibble(site_id = SITE_ID, cor_lactate_year = cor_lactate_year,
         collinearity_flag = abs(cor_lactate_year) > 0.7),
  file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "diagnostics",
       paste0(SITE_ID, "_03_cor_lactate_year.csv")))

write_csv(cohort_summary,
          file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "tables", paste0(SITE_ID, "_01_cohort_summary.csv")))
write_csv(ase_rate_by_year,
          file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "tables", paste0(SITE_ID, "_02_ase_rate_by_year.csv")))
write_csv(hosp_year_summary,
          file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "tables", paste0(SITE_ID, "_03_hosp_year_lactate_summary.csv")))
write_csv(hosp_year_detail,
          file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "tables", paste0(SITE_ID, "_04_hosp_year_lactate_detail.csv")))
write_csv(hosp_year_ase,
          file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "tables", paste0(SITE_ID, "_05_hosp_year_ase_rates.csv")))
write_csv(group_summary,
          file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "tables", paste0(SITE_ID, "_06_patient_group_distribution.csv")))
write_csv(group_clinical,
          file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "tables", paste0(SITE_ID, "_07_clinical_profile_by_group.csv")))

# Coefs — one file per analysis (primary and alt framing folded in together
# as model_a / model_b / model_b_alt rows within each)
write_if(coef_primary,
         file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models", paste0(SITE_ID, "_08_primary_model_coefs.csv")))
# contrast files (primary, alt, SA1, SA2a, SA2b, SA3, SA4); one row per
# analysis x framing (x year for SA2b)
write_if(contrast_all,
         file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models", paste0(SITE_ID, "_09_contrast_estimates_all.csv")))
write_if(blup_df,
         file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models", paste0(SITE_ID, "_10_hospital_level_blups.csv")))
write_if(coef_sa1,
         file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models", paste0(SITE_ID, "_11_sa1_lactate_ordered_coefs.csv")))
write_if(coef_sa2a,
         file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models", paste0(SITE_ID, "_12_sa2a_exclude_covid_coefs.csv")))
write_if(coef_sa2b,
         file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models", paste0(SITE_ID, "_13_sa2b_year_stratified_coefs.csv")))
write_if(coef_sa3,
         file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models", paste0(SITE_ID, "_14_sa3_centered_lactate_coefs.csv")))

# vcov exported as separate CSVs for coordinating center use
if (!is.null(vcov_a))
  write_csv(as.data.frame(vcov_a),
            file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models", paste0(SITE_ID, "_15_vcov_model_a.csv")))
if (!is.null(vcov_b))
  write_csv(as.data.frame(vcov_b),
            file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models", paste0(SITE_ID, "_16_vcov_model_b.csv")))

# RE variance — consolidated across all analyses (primary, SA1, SA2a, SA2b,
# SA3, SA4), each already carrying model_a/model_b/model_b_alt rows, tagged
# by analysis x framing (x year for SA2b). 

write_if(re_var_all,
         file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models", paste0(SITE_ID, "_17_re_variance_all.csv")))

# SA4 coefs (SOFA-dropped sensitivity; contrast lives in contrast_all above)
write_if(coef_sa4,
         file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models", paste0(SITE_ID, "_18_sa4_sofa_dropped_coefs.csv")))

cat("CSV exports complete.\n")

# 6.3 RDS + JSON
saveRDS(output_list,
        file = file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models",
                    paste0(SITE_ID, "_ASE_results.rds")))

output_json <- output_list
output_json[c("fig_lactate_trend", "fig_ase_gap",
              "fig_group_dist", "fig_clinical_profile",
              "fig_framing_comparison")] <- NULL
output_json$vcov_model_a <- if (!is.null(vcov_a)) as.data.frame(vcov_a) else NULL
output_json$vcov_model_b <- if (!is.null(vcov_b)) as.data.frame(vcov_b) else NULL

write_json(output_json,
           path       = file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "models",
                             paste0(SITE_ID, "_ASE_results.json")),
           pretty     = TRUE, auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null")

cat("RDS and JSON exports complete.\n")
cat(paste0("All outputs saved to ", OUTPUT_DIR, " — share entire folder with coordinating center.\n"))
```

---

# Session Info

```{r session-info}
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()),
           file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "diagnostics",
                paste0(SITE_ID, "_session_info.txt")))
sessionInfo()
```

---

# Output File Summary

The following files have been saved to the `<output_directory>/` directory (as configured in `clif_config.json`) for return to the coordinating center.

**Diagnostics (return all):**

- `<output_directory>/diagnostics/[SITE]_01_baseline_completeness.csv`
- `<output_directory>/diagnostics/[SITE]_02_patient_group_qc.csv` — long format: framing (primary/alt) x patient_group, n/pct pre-exclusion
- `<output_directory>/diagnostics/[SITE]_03_cor_lactate_year.csv`
- `<output_directory>/diagnostics/[SITE]_04_patient_group_hosp_year_crosstab.csv` — long format: framing x group n/pct by hospital x year
- `<output_directory>/diagnostics/[SITE]_session_info.txt`

**Tables (return all):**

- `<output_directory>/tables/[SITE]_01_cohort_summary.csv`
- `<output_directory>/tables/[SITE]_02_ase_rate_by_year.csv`
- `<output_directory>/tables/[SITE]_03_hosp_year_lactate_summary.csv`
- `<output_directory>/tables/[SITE]_04_hosp_year_lactate_detail.csv` — hospital-year detail ⭐
- `<output_directory>/tables/[SITE]_05_hosp_year_ase_rates.csv` — long format, primary + alt framing ⭐
- `<output_directory>/tables/[SITE]_06_patient_group_distribution.csv` — long format, primary + alt framing
- `<output_directory>/tables/[SITE]_07_clinical_profile_by_group.csv` — long format (framing x group x metric x value), primary + alt framing

**Models (return all):**

- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_08_primary_model_coefs.csv` — coefficients: model_a, model_b (primary), model_b_alt (alt framing) ⭐
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_09_contrast_estimates_all.csv` — **all contrast estimands, one row per analysis x framing (x year for SA2b)** ⭐
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_10_hospital_level_blups.csv` — hospital-level forest plot inputs ⭐
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_11_sa1_lactate_ordered_coefs.csv` — model_a, model_b, model_b_alt
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_12_sa2a_exclude_covid_coefs.csv` — model_a, model_b, model_b_alt
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_13_sa2b_year_stratified_coefs.csv` — model_a, model_b, model_b_alt, one row set per year
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_14_sa3_centered_lactate_coefs.csv` — model_a, model_b, model_b_alt
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_15_vcov_model_a.csv` — vcov for Model A (coordinating center use)
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_16_vcov_model_b.csv` — vcov for Model B (coordinating center use)
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_17_re_variance_all.csv` — **all RE variance estimates, one row per analysis x framing x model_label (x year for SA2b)** ⭐. Between-hospital sigma^2/sigma from glmer; NA stubs on the glm (single-hospital) path.
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_18_sa4_sofa_dropped_coefs.csv` — SA4 model_a, model_b, model_b_alt coefficients (SOFA dropped)
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_ASE_results.rds` — full output bundle ⭐
- `<output_directory>/models/[SITE]_ASE_results.json`

Models folder renumbered to consecutive 08–18 as of this restructuring (previously had gaps from the contrast-file consolidation, then renumbered again when the 6 separate RE variance files were folded into one). This is a one-time renumbering done ahead of any cross-site results and before ASE_metaanalysis_v3.R has been updated to match — no downstream script depends on the old numbering yet. Once this version goes out to other sites and the CC script is built against it, any future consolidation should go back to leaving gaps rather than renumbering, so a stale CC script fails loudly on a missing file instead of silently reading the wrong one under a reused number.

**Figures (return if flagged issues):**

- `<output_directory>/figures/[SITE]_fig1_lactate_ase_trend.png`
- `<output_directory>/figures/[SITE]_fig2_ase_rate_gap.png`
- `<output_directory>/figures/[SITE]_fig3_patient_group_distribution.png`
- `<output_directory>/figures/[SITE]_fig4_clinical_profile.png`
- `<output_directory>/figures/[SITE]_fig5_framing_comparison.png` — primary vs alternative (§4b) framing comparison, model coefficients + contrast forest

**Do NOT share (local only):**

- Hospital de-identification crosswalk (printed to console only)
